## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New or updated task proposal
- [ ] New or updated harness
- [ ] Scoring / grading change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, sealed answers, or absolute local paths committed
- [ ] `python -m pytest benchmark/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated (README / METHODOLOGY / CHANGELOG) where applicable
